# /CTRL

> A modular control layer for Bitwig Studio. Build dynamic behavior, not static mappings.

/CTRL is a Bitwig Studio extension that lets you build custom MIDI configurations, OSC workflows, macros, and automation systems. It works with any MIDI controller and any OSC-capable device.

## Key Features

- **MIDI Hardware**: Multi-device routing, layered control, LED feedback, encoders, faders, and expanding driver support
- **OSC**: Bidirectional network control with flexible routing and multi-client support
- **Components**: Composable, modular building blocks on top of Bitwig's API — device chains, unlimited remote controls, shareable kits
- **Commands**: Map hardware inputs to Bitwig Actions with chaining, variables, and sub-millisecond layer switching
- **Macros**: Text-based macro language for custom automation logic — event-driven, parameterized, real-time
- **Recall**: Capture and restore parameter states with selective restore, morphing, and triggerable snapshots

## Details

- Platform: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Category: Music Production / MIDI / OSC / Bitwig Extension
- Status: Actively in development, early access via Patreon
- Website: https://slashctrl.io
- Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/c/slashctrl

## Who It's For

Producers, performers, and sound designers who want full control over how their system behaves, evolves, and connects. Designed for builders who want to shape behavior instead of accepting defaults.
